hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-medium leading-[1.1]
hierarchy.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-zinc-500

layout_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. The 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A) for features.

surfaces_and_components.bento_card: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden transition-colors hover:border-zinc-700
surfaces_and_components.glass_header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#030303]/70 border-b border-zinc-800/60
surfaces_and_components.button_primary: bg-emerald-500 text-black px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-emerald-400 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2
surfaces_and_components.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-900 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2
surfaces_and_components.input_field: bg-[#121212] border border-zinc-800 text-white px-4 py-4 focus:outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 transition-all w-full placeholder:text-zinc-600
surfaces_and_components.ladder_motif: Use horizontal 1px border lines (border-b border-zinc-800) across sections to simulate a 'ladder' or 'grid' background.

animations.global: Subtle, no flashy bounces. Professional quant finance feel.
animations.entrance: Staggered fade-up (Framer Motion: y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut')
animations.hover: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and border color lightens. Buttons scale up 1.02.

hero_background.description: Abstract neon green/red lines on black. Use as a low opacity (10-15%) background image behind the hero. Add a radial mask so it fades into black at the edges.

product_chart_1.description: Premium stock chart on screen. Use as the main visual for the Hero mockup or 'View Example' section.

product_chart_2.description: Close-up cryptocurrency trading chart. Use for 'Chart Examples' and 'How It Works' feature cards.

page_sections.details: Sticky glass header. Left: 'ApexQ' logo. Middle: Hidden on mobile, links (Features, Examples, Pricing). Right: 'Get Access' button (small variant).

Centered layout with generous top padding (pt-40). H1: 'See when the market is about to move before it happens.' Subtitle: 'Compression Ladder is the boutique quant tool for clarity over noise.' Email Capture Form inline with 'Get Access' button. Followed by a massive, edge-to-edge 'product_chart_1' image with a bottom gradient fade into the next section.
3-column bento grid using 'Tetris' logic. Focus on 3 key pillars. Use `bento_card` styling. Incorporate Phosphor Icons (light weight). Accent specific data points with the `mono_stats` typography.
Vertical timeline or 3 stepped horizontal cards mimicking a 'Ladder'. Step 1: Detect, Step 2: Confirm, Step 3: Execute. Use subtle green accents for the 'ladder' connecting lines.
Full-width section showcasing `product_chart_2`. Text overlaid or side-by-side with annotations/captions explaining the 'Compression Ladder' methodology.
Side-by-side layout. Left: Traditional Indicators (noisy, lagging) - use zinc/red tones. Right: Compression Ladder (predictive, clean) - use emerald glows.
Single premium card centered on the page. $79/mo. Subtle emerald 'Tracing Beam' or outer glow on the card. Large 'Get Access' CTA connecting to mocked Stripe Checkout. List of premium features below.
Top half: 'Understand the market before it moves.' with secondary CTA. Bottom half: Huge 'ApexQ' text watermark. Disclaimer block about trading risks. Links to Instagram, Contact, Terms.

guidelines: Use RAW HTML/Tailwind for layouts. Avoid overusing pre-built Shadcn containers which limit creative bento grids.
Ensure all color values use the explicit hex codes or exact tailwind arbitrary values as defined in colors.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive and major layout nodes.
